name: fin_accounts
title: Chart of Accounts
description: Double-entry chart of accounts: the 5 real account types (asset/liability/equity/income/expense), optionally arranged into a parent/child hierarchy via parent_id. Reconciled against a private predecessor-system audit, not part of this repo (its Account model: 'COA hierarchy, 5 types'). No account seeding/entity-mode behavior is built here (the source's Entity model seeds a starter chart of accounts per books-mode; this package carries plain accounts only -- see dbbasic-package.json's Deferred list).

fields.name: code
fields.label: Code
fields.help: Optional account code/number, e.g. "1000". Not auto-assigned or required -- an owner may leave it blank.

fields.name: account_type
fields.label: Type
fields.help: The 5 real double-entry account types, matching the predecessor system's Account model exactly (reconciled against a private source audit, not part of this repo).

fields.name: parent_id
fields.label: Parent Account
fields.help: Optional self-relation for a parent/child chart-of-accounts hierarchy (e.g. "Bank Accounts" under "Assets"). Nothing in this package enforces a parent's account_type matches its children's, or guards against a cycle -- the source's own Account model did not enforce either (reconciled against a private predecessor-system audit, not part of this repo), so neither is added here.
